## VisiumHD

### preamble

```{r load-libs}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(SpatialData)
library(SpatialData.data)
library(SpatialData.plot)
```

```{r load-data}
sd <- MouseIntestineVisHD()
```

```{r}
# simplify lengthly element names
sp <- sd
ex <- "Visium_HD_Mouse_Small_Intestine_"
for (. in c("images", "shapes", "tables")) {
    old <- names(sp[[.]])
    new <- gsub(ex, "", old)
    names(sp[[.]]) <- new
}
show(sp)
```

### analysis

```{r}
lr <- grep("lowres", imageNames(sd))
cl <- rep(list(c(0, 1/3)), 3) # contrasts
plotSpatialData() + plotImage(sd, lr, cl=cl)
```

### appendix

::: {.callout-note icon=false, collapse=true}

### session

```{r sess-info}
sessionInfo()
```

:::
